methodology.description: Series are ranked using FRED web search popularity ordering across policy-relevant macro terms, then constrained to preserve report coverage and dataset continuity.
methodology.connection_rule: Connections combine co-appearance in report presets (weight 3) and co-appearance in top search results for the same query term (weight 1).
